headline: You can buy gold on Amazon — but should you?
summary: Amazon is one option to buy gold bullion online, but here's what you need to know before you put it in your cart.

headline: Just got laid off? Here's where to put your severance right now
summary: Make your severance work for you by putting it into a high-APY account or building an emergency fund.

headline: FIS SaaS Win With Integrity Viking Funds Highlights Recurring Fintech Push
summary: Integrity Viking Funds has adopted Fidelity National Information Services’ (NYSE:FIS) SaaS-based Investment Accounting Manager. The move showcases FIS’s growing reach in cloud technology and its ability to support complex investment accounting needs across the asset management industry. The adoption highlights demand from asset managers seeking to modernize and automate investment accounting processes beyond traditional banking and payments use cases. For you as an investor, this update...
